items.title: oriz-finance launches: free, browser-only calculators
items.content_text: SIP, lumpsum, step-up SIP, SWP, FIRE, EMI, FD, RD, PPF, NPS, take-home, HRA, GST — all in your browser, nothing leaves the device.
